# Stax

> Stax is a mobile-first app for investing in real companies through tokenized stocks on the Mantle network, guided by Vera, an AI investing assistant. You describe a goal in plain words; Vera turns it into a portfolio of tokenized shares and places it in one tap.

Stax is built for people who are new to investing and to crypto. There is no seed phrase and no gas: you sign in with email, and Stax covers the fees. Holdings are real tokenized shares (issued 1:1 by Backed), held in self-custody and recorded on-chain, with settlement in USDC. Because every action is signed on-chain, your track record can't be edited.

## Key facts

- Invest by describing a goal in plain language to Vera, an AI investing assistant.
- Buy fractional, tokenized shares of well-known global companies (for example NVDA, AAPL, TSLA, GOOGL, META, and the S&P 500 via SPY).
- Email login — no seed phrase, no browser extension, no manual wallet setup.
- Gasless, with fees on us: no gas costs and no account fees.
- Real shares: tokenized 1:1 by Backed, held in self-custody, recorded on-chain.
- Autopilot: optional automated, recurring investing (dollar-cost averaging).
- Built on Mantle. You can start from as little as $1.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.stax.best): product overview and how it works.
- [Live demo](https://www.stax.best/demo): try Stax with demo data, no login required.
- [Open the app](https://www.stax.best/app): the live product.
